name: inductor
description: Default backend — generates Triton GPU kernels and C++ CPU kernels

name: eager
description: Debug backend — runs captured graph in eager mode

name: cudagraphs
description: CUDA graphs backend for reduced kernel launch overhead

name: cutedsl
description: CuteDSL-based kernel generation backend for inductor

name: max-autotune
description: Autotuning backend that benchmarks multiple implementations to select fastest
